role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund seeks to provide daily investment results that reflect the combined daily performance of the underlying funds. Under normal market conditions, each underlying fund expects that 100% of its assets will be invested in Benchmark Component Futures Contracts and in cash and cash equivalents.
